identity: Human male swashbuckler, young adult, long wavy auburn-brown hair falling past the shoulders, warm brown eyes, trimmed mustache and goatee, confident smirk.
outfit: Bright red coat with gold trim along the lapels and wide gold-trimmed cuffs, open at the chest revealing a cream linen inner shirt, brown leather gloves.
weapons: A slender steel rapier with a simple silver swept-hilt held upright in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-lunge rapier thrust forward at chest height with the right hand, left arm flared back for balance, red coat tails streaming, one leg extended forward.
spellStyle: East-facing. Rapier held to the side, left hand flourished forward with a glittering silver spark trailing through the air.
blockStyle: East-facing. Rapier held vertically in front of the body as a parry guard, chin tucked, back straight.
koStyle: East-facing, on one knee, rapier fallen beside him, head bowed, red coat slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), dashing idle. Rapier held point-down in the right hand at his side, left hand on hip, coat slightly open.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Long wavy auburn-brown hair, mustache and goatee, red coat with gold trim over a cream linen shirt, slender steel rapier held upright in the right hand.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male swashbuckler, young adult, long wavy auburn-brown hair falling past the shoulders, warm brown eyes, trimmed mustache and goatee, confident smirk.

OUTFIT: Bright red coat with gold trim along the lapels and wide gold-trimmed cuffs, open at the chest revealing a cream linen inner shirt, brown leather gloves.

WEAPONS: A slender steel rapier with a simple silver swept-hilt held upright in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male swashbuckler, young adult, long wavy auburn-brown hair falling past the shoulders, warm brown eyes, trimmed mustache and goatee, confident smirk.

OUTFIT: Bright red coat with gold trim along the lapels and wide gold-trimmed cuffs, open at the chest revealing a cream linen inner shirt, brown leather gloves.

WEAPONS: A slender steel rapier with a simple silver swept-hilt held upright in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Long wavy auburn-brown hair, mustache and goatee, red coat with gold trim over a cream linen shirt, slender steel rapier held upright in the right hand.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
